title: phaius wallichii
intro: Phaius wallichii, also known as the Wallich's orchid or yellow ground orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments.
